Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A Love Letter to 'Girl Games' 40 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. RubyGems Fracture Incident Report 35 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Good CTE, Bad CTE 143 upvotes, 34 comments
  4. Do your own writing 685 upvotes, 218 comments
  5. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 141 upvotes, 39 comments
  6. Combinators 83 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1532 upvotes, 600 comments
  8. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 412 upvotes, 147 comments
  9. Tell HN: Chrome says "suspicious download" when trying to download yt-dlp 152 upvotes, 49 comments
  10. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 637 upvotes, 252 comments
  11. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 253 upvotes, 95 comments
  12. Dot – A Siri Replacement learns skills through Apple Shortcuts 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. Italy blocks US use of Sicily air base for Middle East war 118 upvotes, 43 comments
  14. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 135 upvotes, 56 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 528 upvotes, 260 comments
  16. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 46 upvotes, 15 comments
  17. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1147 upvotes, 612 comments
  18. Show HN: Hyprmoncfg – Terminal-based monitor config manager for Hyprland 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Multiple Sclerosis 42 upvotes, 17 comments
  20. Artemis II is not safe to fly 698 upvotes, 442 comments
  21. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 20 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  23. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. Project Mario: the inside story of DeepMind 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 129 upvotes, 80 comments
  26. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 515 upvotes, 396 comments
  27. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 77 upvotes, 52 comments
  28. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Good Code Will Still Win 7 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
